pub fn zenrav1e::data::EncoderStats::default() -> Self

pub struct zenrav1e::prelude::context::Context<T: v_frame::pixel::Pixel>

pub fn zenrav1e::prelude::Context<T>::container_sequence_header(&self) -> alloc::vec::Vec<u8>
pub fn zenrav1e::prelude::Context<T>::flush(&mut self)
pub fn zenrav1e::prelude::Context<T>::new_frame(&self) -> v_frame::frame::Frame<T>

pub fn zenrav1e::prelude::Context<T>::send_frame<F>(&mut self, F) -> core::result::Result<(), zenrav1e::prelude::EncoderStatus> where F: zenrav1e::prelude::IntoFrame<T>
pub fn zenrav1e::prelude::Context<T>::twopass_bytes_needed(&mut self) -> usize
pub fn zenrav1e::prelude::Context<T>::twopass_in(&mut self, &[u8]) -> core::result::Result<usize, zenrav1e::prelude::EncoderStatus>
pub fn zenrav1e::prelude::Context<T>::twopass_out(&mut self) -> core::option::Option<&[u8]>

pub fn zenrav1e::prelude::Context<T>::rc_send_pass_data(&mut self, &[u8]) -> core::result::Result<(), zenrav1e::prelude::EncoderStatus>
pub fn zenrav1e::prelude::Context<T>::rc_summary_size(&self) -> usize

pub fn zenrav1e::prelude::Context<T>::fmt(&self, &mut core::fmt::Formatter<'_>) -> core::result::Result<(), core::fmt::Error>

impl<T> core::marker::Send for zenrav1e::prelude::Context<T>

pub enum zenrav1e::prelude::BlockSize
pub zenrav1e::prelude::BlockSize::BLOCK_128X128
pub zenrav1e::prelude::BlockSize::BLOCK_128X64
pub zenrav1e::prelude::BlockSize::BLOCK_16X16
pub zenrav1e::prelude::BlockSize::BLOCK_16X32

pub zenrav1e::prelude::BlockSize::BLOCK_16X8

pub zenrav1e::prelude::BlockSize::BLOCK_32X32
pub zenrav1e::prelude::BlockSize::BLOCK_32X64
pub zenrav1e::prelude::BlockSize::BLOCK_32X8
pub zenrav1e::prelude::BlockSize::BLOCK_4X16
pub zenrav1e::prelude::BlockSize::BLOCK_4X4
pub zenrav1e::prelude::BlockSize::BLOCK_4X8

pub zenrav1e::prelude::BlockSize::BLOCK_64X16
pub zenrav1e::prelude::BlockSize::BLOCK_64X32
pub zenrav1e::prelude::BlockSize::BLOCK_64X64

pub struct zenrav1e::prelude::Context<T: v_frame::pixel::Pixel>
impl<T: v_frame::pixel::Pixel> zenrav1e::prelude::Context<T>
pub fn zenrav1e::prelude::Context<T>::container_sequence_header(&self) -> alloc::vec::Vec<u8>
pub fn zenrav1e::prelude::Context<T>::flush(&mut self)
pub fn zenrav1e::prelude::Context<T>::new_frame(&self) -> v_frame::frame::Frame<T>
pub fn zenrav1e::prelude::Context<T>::receive_packet(&mut self) -> core::result::Result<zenrav1e::prelude::Packet<T>, zenrav1e::prelude::EncoderStatus>
pub fn zenrav1e::prelude::Context<T>::send_frame<F>(&mut self, F) -> core::result::Result<(), zenrav1e::prelude::EncoderStatus> where F: zenrav1e::prelude::IntoFrame<T>
pub fn zenrav1e::prelude::Context<T>::twopass_bytes_needed(&mut self) -> usize
pub fn zenrav1e::prelude::Context<T>::twopass_in(&mut self, &[u8]) -> core::result::Result<usize, zenrav1e::prelude::EncoderStatus>
pub fn zenrav1e::prelude::Context<T>::twopass_out(&mut self) -> core::option::Option<&[u8]>
impl<T: v_frame::pixel::Pixel> zenrav1e::prelude::Context<T>
pub fn zenrav1e::prelude::Context<T>::rc_receive_pass_data(&mut self) -> core::option::Option<zenrav1e::prelude::RcData>
pub fn zenrav1e::prelude::Context<T>::rc_second_pass_data_required(&self) -> usize
pub fn zenrav1e::prelude::Context<T>::rc_send_pass_data(&mut self, &[u8]) -> core::result::Result<(), zenrav1e::prelude::EncoderStatus>
pub fn zenrav1e::prelude::Context<T>::rc_summary_size(&self) -> usize
impl<T: v_frame::pixel::Pixel> core::fmt::Debug for zenrav1e::prelude::Context<T>
pub fn zenrav1e::prelude::Context<T>::fmt(&self, &mut core::fmt::Formatter<'_>) -> core::result::Result<(), core::fmt::Error>
impl<T> core::marker::Freeze for zenrav1e::prelude::Context<T>
impl<T> core::marker::Send for zenrav1e::prelude::Context<T>
impl<T> core::marker::Sync for zenrav1e::prelude::Context<T>
impl<T> core::marker::Unpin for zenrav1e::prelude::Context<T> where T: core::marker::Unpin
impl<T> core::marker::UnsafeUnpin for zenrav1e::prelude::Context<T>
impl<T> !core::panic::unwind_safe::RefUnwindSafe for zenrav1e::prelude::Context<T>

pub zenrav1e::prelude::Sequence::enable_large_lru: bool
pub zenrav1e::prelude::Sequence::enable_masked_compound: bool

pub zenrav1e::prelude::Sequence::enable_superres: bool
pub zenrav1e::prelude::Sequence::enable_warped_motion: bool

pub zenrav1e::prelude::Sequence::max_frame_height: u32
pub zenrav1e::prelude::Sequence::max_frame_width: u32
pub zenrav1e::prelude::Sequence::num_bits_height: u32
pub zenrav1e::prelude::Sequence::num_bits_width: u32
pub zenrav1e::prelude::Sequence::operating_point_idc: [u16; 32]
pub zenrav1e::prelude::Sequence::operating_points_cnt_minus_1: usize

pub trait zenrav1e::prelude::IntoFrame<T: v_frame::pixel::Pixel>
pub fn zenrav1e::prelude::IntoFrame::into(self) -> (core::option::Option<alloc::sync::Arc<v_frame::frame::Frame<T>>>, core::option::Option<zenrav1e::prelude::FrameParameters>)
impl<T: v_frame::pixel::Pixel> zenrav1e::prelude::IntoFrame<T> for (alloc::sync::Arc<v_frame::frame::Frame<T>>, core::option::Option<zenrav1e::prelude::FrameParameters>)
pub fn (alloc::sync::Arc<v_frame::frame::Frame<T>>, core::option::Option<zenrav1e::prelude::FrameParameters>)::into(self) -> (core::option::Option<alloc::sync::Arc<v_frame::frame::Frame<T>>>, core::option::Option<zenrav1e::prelude::FrameParameters>)
impl<T: v_frame::pixel::Pixel> zenrav1e::prelude::IntoFrame<T> for (alloc::sync::Arc<v_frame::frame::Frame<T>>, zenrav1e::prelude::FrameParameters)
pub fn (alloc::sync::Arc<v_frame::frame::Frame<T>>, zenrav1e::prelude::FrameParameters)::into(self) -> (core::option::Option<alloc::sync::Arc<v_frame::frame::Frame<T>>>, core::option::Option<zenrav1e::prelude::FrameParameters>)
impl<T: v_frame::pixel::Pixel> zenrav1e::prelude::IntoFrame<T> for (v_frame::frame::Frame<T>, core::option::Option<zenrav1e::prelude::FrameParameters>)
pub fn (v_frame::frame::Frame<T>, core::option::Option<zenrav1e::prelude::FrameParameters>)::into(self) -> (core::option::Option<alloc::sync::Arc<v_frame::frame::Frame<T>>>, core::option::Option<zenrav1e::prelude::FrameParameters>)
impl<T: v_frame::pixel::Pixel> zenrav1e::prelude::IntoFrame<T> for (v_frame::frame::Frame<T>, zenrav1e::prelude::FrameParameters)
pub fn (v_frame::frame::Frame<T>, zenrav1e::prelude::FrameParameters)::into(self) -> (core::option::Option<alloc::sync::Arc<v_frame::frame::Frame<T>>>, core::option::Option<zenrav1e::prelude::FrameParameters>)
impl<T: v_frame::pixel::Pixel> zenrav1e::prelude::IntoFrame<T> for alloc::sync::Arc<v_frame::frame::Frame<T>>
pub fn alloc::sync::Arc<v_frame::frame::Frame<T>>::into(self) -> (core::option::Option<alloc::sync::Arc<v_frame::frame::Frame<T>>>, core::option::Option<zenrav1e::prelude::FrameParameters>)
impl<T: v_frame::pixel::Pixel> zenrav1e::prelude::IntoFrame<T> for core::option::Option<alloc::sync::Arc<v_frame::frame::Frame<T>>>
pub fn core::option::Option<alloc::sync::Arc<v_frame::frame::Frame<T>>>::into(self) -> (core::option::Option<alloc::sync::Arc<v_frame::frame::Frame<T>>>, core::option::Option<zenrav1e::prelude::FrameParameters>)
impl<T: v_frame::pixel::Pixel> zenrav1e::prelude::IntoFrame<T> for v_frame::frame::Frame<T>
pub fn v_frame::frame::Frame<T>::into(self) -> (core::option::Option<alloc::sync::Arc<v_frame::frame::Frame<T>>>, core::option::Option<zenrav1e::prelude::FrameParameters>)

pub enum zenrav1e::EncoderStatus
pub zenrav1e::EncoderStatus::Cancelled
pub zenrav1e::EncoderStatus::Encoded
pub zenrav1e::EncoderStatus::EnoughData
pub zenrav1e::EncoderStatus::Failure
pub zenrav1e::EncoderStatus::LimitReached
pub zenrav1e::EncoderStatus::NeedMoreData
pub zenrav1e::EncoderStatus::NotReady

pub struct zenrav1e::Context<T: v_frame::pixel::Pixel>
impl<T: v_frame::pixel::Pixel> zenrav1e::prelude::Context<T>
pub fn zenrav1e::prelude::Context<T>::container_sequence_header(&self) -> alloc::vec::Vec<u8>
pub fn zenrav1e::prelude::Context<T>::flush(&mut self)
pub fn zenrav1e::prelude::Context<T>::new_frame(&self) -> v_frame::frame::Frame<T>
pub fn zenrav1e::prelude::Context<T>::receive_packet(&mut self) -> core::result::Result<zenrav1e::prelude::Packet<T>, zenrav1e::prelude::EncoderStatus>
pub fn zenrav1e::prelude::Context<T>::send_frame<F>(&mut self, F) -> core::result::Result<(), zenrav1e::prelude::EncoderStatus> where F: zenrav1e::prelude::IntoFrame<T>
pub fn zenrav1e::prelude::Context<T>::twopass_bytes_needed(&mut self) -> usize
pub fn zenrav1e::prelude::Context<T>::twopass_in(&mut self, &[u8]) -> core::result::Result<usize, zenrav1e::prelude::EncoderStatus>
pub fn zenrav1e::prelude::Context<T>::twopass_out(&mut self) -> core::option::Option<&[u8]>
impl<T: v_frame::pixel::Pixel> zenrav1e::prelude::Context<T>
pub fn zenrav1e::prelude::Context<T>::rc_receive_pass_data(&mut self) -> core::option::Option<zenrav1e::prelude::RcData>
pub fn zenrav1e::prelude::Context<T>::rc_second_pass_data_required(&self) -> usize
pub fn zenrav1e::prelude::Context<T>::rc_send_pass_data(&mut self, &[u8]) -> core::result::Result<(), zenrav1e::prelude::EncoderStatus>
pub fn zenrav1e::prelude::Context<T>::rc_summary_size(&self) -> usize
impl<T: v_frame::pixel::Pixel> core::fmt::Debug for zenrav1e::prelude::Context<T>
pub fn zenrav1e::prelude::Context<T>::fmt(&self, &mut core::fmt::Formatter<'_>) -> core::result::Result<(), core::fmt::Error>
impl<T> core::marker::Freeze for zenrav1e::prelude::Context<T>
impl<T> core::marker::Send for zenrav1e::prelude::Context<T>
impl<T> core::marker::Sync for zenrav1e::prelude::Context<T>
impl<T> core::marker::Unpin for zenrav1e::prelude::Context<T> where T: core::marker::Unpin
impl<T> core::marker::UnsafeUnpin for zenrav1e::prelude::Context<T>
impl<T> !core::panic::unwind_safe::RefUnwindSafe for zenrav1e::prelude::Context<T>
impl<T> !core::panic::unwind_safe::UnwindSafe for zenrav1e::prelude::Context<T>
pub struct zenrav1e::EncoderConfig
pub zenrav1e::EncoderConfig::bit_depth: usize
pub zenrav1e::EncoderConfig::bitrate: i32
pub zenrav1e::EncoderConfig::chroma_sample_position: zenrav1e::prelude::ChromaSamplePosition
pub zenrav1e::EncoderConfig::chroma_sampling: v_frame::pixel::ChromaSampling
pub zenrav1e::EncoderConfig::color_description: core::option::Option<zenrav1e::prelude::ColorDescription>
pub zenrav1e::EncoderConfig::content_light: core::option::Option<zenrav1e::prelude::ContentLight>
pub zenrav1e::EncoderConfig::enable_qm: bool
pub zenrav1e::EncoderConfig::enable_timing_info: bool
pub zenrav1e::EncoderConfig::enable_trellis: bool
pub zenrav1e::EncoderConfig::enable_vaq: bool
pub zenrav1e::EncoderConfig::error_resilient: bool
pub zenrav1e::EncoderConfig::film_grain_params: core::option::Option<alloc::vec::Vec<av1_grain::GrainTableSegment>>
pub zenrav1e::EncoderConfig::height: usize
pub zenrav1e::EncoderConfig::level_idx: core::option::Option<u8>
pub zenrav1e::EncoderConfig::low_latency: bool
pub zenrav1e::EncoderConfig::mastering_display: core::option::Option<zenrav1e::prelude::MasteringDisplay>
pub zenrav1e::EncoderConfig::max_key_frame_interval: u64
pub zenrav1e::EncoderConfig::max_pixel_count: u64
pub zenrav1e::EncoderConfig::min_key_frame_interval: u64
pub zenrav1e::EncoderConfig::min_quantizer: u8
pub zenrav1e::EncoderConfig::pixel_range: zenrav1e::prelude::PixelRange
pub zenrav1e::EncoderConfig::quantizer: usize
pub zenrav1e::EncoderConfig::reservoir_frame_delay: core::option::Option<i32>
pub zenrav1e::EncoderConfig::sample_aspect_ratio: zenrav1e::prelude::Rational
pub zenrav1e::EncoderConfig::seg_boost: f64
pub zenrav1e::EncoderConfig::speed_settings: zenrav1e::prelude::SpeedSettings
pub zenrav1e::EncoderConfig::still_picture: bool
pub zenrav1e::EncoderConfig::switch_frame_interval: u64
pub zenrav1e::EncoderConfig::tile_cols: usize
pub zenrav1e::EncoderConfig::tile_rows: usize
pub zenrav1e::EncoderConfig::tiles: usize
pub zenrav1e::EncoderConfig::time_base: zenrav1e::prelude::Rational
pub zenrav1e::EncoderConfig::tune: zenrav1e::prelude::Tune
pub zenrav1e::EncoderConfig::vaq_strength: f64
pub zenrav1e::EncoderConfig::width: usize
impl zenrav1e::prelude::EncoderConfig
pub fn zenrav1e::prelude::EncoderConfig::frame_rate(&self) -> f64
pub fn zenrav1e::prelude::EncoderConfig::is_hdr(&self) -> bool
pub fn zenrav1e::prelude::EncoderConfig::render_size(&self) -> (usize, usize)
pub fn zenrav1e::prelude::EncoderConfig::set_key_frame_interval(&mut self, u64, u64)
pub const fn zenrav1e::prelude::EncoderConfig::temporal_rdo(&self) -> bool
pub fn zenrav1e::prelude::EncoderConfig::with_speed_preset(u8) -> Self
impl core::clone::Clone for zenrav1e::prelude::EncoderConfig
pub fn zenrav1e::prelude::EncoderConfig::clone(&self) -> zenrav1e::prelude::EncoderConfig
impl core::default::Default for zenrav1e::prelude::EncoderConfig
pub fn zenrav1e::prelude::EncoderConfig::default() -> Self
impl core::fmt::Debug for zenrav1e::prelude::EncoderConfig
pub fn zenrav1e::prelude::EncoderConfig::fmt(&self, &mut core::fmt::Formatter<'_>) -> core::fmt::Result
impl core::fmt::Display for zenrav1e::prelude::EncoderConfig
pub fn zenrav1e::prelude::EncoderConfig::fmt(&self, &mut core::fmt::Formatter<'_>) -> core::result::Result<(), core::fmt::Error>
impl core::marker::Freeze for zenrav1e::prelude::EncoderConfig
impl core::marker::Send for zenrav1e::prelude::EncoderConfig
impl core::marker::Sync for zenrav1e::prelude::EncoderConfig
impl core::marker::Unpin for zenrav1e::prelude::EncoderConfig
impl core::marker::UnsafeUnpin for zenrav1e::prelude::EncoderConfig
impl core::panic::unwind_safe::RefUnwindSafe for zenrav1e::prelude::EncoderConfig
impl core::panic::unwind_safe::UnwindSafe for zenrav1e::prelude::EncoderConfig
pub struct zenrav1e::Packet<T: v_frame::pixel::Pixel>
pub zenrav1e::Packet::data: alloc::vec::Vec<u8>
pub zenrav1e::Packet::enc_stats: zenrav1e::data::EncoderStats
pub zenrav1e::Packet::frame_type: zenrav1e::prelude::FrameType
pub zenrav1e::Packet::input_frameno: u64
pub zenrav1e::Packet::opaque: core::option::Option<zenrav1e::prelude::Opaque>
pub zenrav1e::Packet::qp: u8
pub zenrav1e::Packet::rec: core::option::Option<alloc::sync::Arc<v_frame::frame::Frame<T>>>
pub zenrav1e::Packet::source: core::option::Option<alloc::sync::Arc<v_frame::frame::Frame<T>>>
impl<T: core::fmt::Debug + v_frame::pixel::Pixel> core::fmt::Debug for zenrav1e::prelude::Packet<T>
pub fn zenrav1e::prelude::Packet<T>::fmt(&self, &mut core::fmt::Formatter<'_>) -> core::fmt::Result
impl<T: v_frame::pixel::Pixel> core::cmp::PartialEq for zenrav1e::prelude::Packet<T>
pub fn zenrav1e::prelude::Packet<T>::eq(&self, &Self) -> bool
impl<T: v_frame::pixel::Pixel> core::fmt::Display for zenrav1e::prelude::Packet<T>
pub fn zenrav1e::prelude::Packet<T>::fmt(&self, &mut core::fmt::Formatter<'_>) -> core::fmt::Result
impl<T> core::marker::Freeze for zenrav1e::prelude::Packet<T>
impl<T> core::marker::Send for zenrav1e::prelude::Packet<T>
impl<T> core::marker::Sync for zenrav1e::prelude::Packet<T>
impl<T> core::marker::Unpin for zenrav1e::prelude::Packet<T>
impl<T> core::marker::UnsafeUnpin for zenrav1e::prelude::Packet<T>
impl<T> !core::panic::unwind_safe::RefUnwindSafe for zenrav1e::prelude::Packet<T>
impl<T> !core::panic::unwind_safe::UnwindSafe for zenrav1e::prelude::Packet<T>
